label: Timberland and housing-linked wood fiber

orientation.note: Timber REITs and timber ops linked to housing starts and stumpage cycles.

interference.physics_note: Physical path exists; bottlenecks are capacity and permits.
interference.economic_note: Unit economics vary by sub-cluster; context only.
interference.regulatory_note: Harvest rules, endangered-species and fire regimes.
interference.controlled_failures_note: Single-name delay is path noise, not theme falsification.

reinforcement.recursive_note: Demand and scarcity can reinforce when orientation holds.

expected_value_note: Context only. Do not auto-inflate Lawrence IRR.
